chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : في 5 حاجة الرجل لأخيه المسلم ثلاث: تعجيلها، وتصغيرها، وسترها، فإذا عجلتها هنيتها، وإذا صغرتها فقد عظمتها وإذا سترتها فقد صنتها

en.muhajir-b-ali: 139. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: An individual who intends to fulfill the need of his Muslim brother, three characteristics must be observed: expediting it, making it look little and concealing it. When you expedite it, it becomes wholesome; and when you make it look small, you in fact make it great; and when you conceal it, you have preserved it (i.e. its reward).
